briefdescription.para: Streaming API for doppler — PUB/SUB, PUSH/PULL, REQ/REP.

detaileddescription.para: Provides ZMQ-backed signal streaming using three messaging patterns:

Pattern
Sender function
Receiver function
Use case
PUB/SUB
dp_pub_*
dp_sub_*
Fan-out broadcast
PUSH/PULL
dp_push_*
dp_pull_*
Pipeline /
load-balance| | REQ/REP | dp_req_* | dp_rep_* | Control / metadata |
